request_payload.exposure_text: I've been volunteering with local emergency response teams for years, and let me tell you, civil defense preparedness isn't just about big government spending. It's about communities coming together to protect each other. My neighborhood's emergency drill last month showed how effective local initiatives can be. We had over 100 people show up, and it was amazing to see how prepared we all were. This is what real security looks like—neighbors helping neighbors. #CommunityPreparedness #CivilDefense
